title: Reeds Endomorphism f: Z_23 -> Z_23
source: Jim Reeds (1998-2006), reverse-engineered from Bodley MS 908 (Book of Soyga)
description: General endomorphism on Z_23 with cycle type (3,3,2,1) and 4 attractor basins. This is the lookup table that defines the Daugherty coupling matrix J.
alphabet_note: 23 letters (Latin alphabet minus 'j' and 'w'), standard Soyga convention

reeds_table.description: f(x) for each letter, given as both letter and numeric index

coupling_construction.description: The 23x23 Daugherty coupling matrix J is built from f's functional graph
coupling_construction.adjacency: A[i][j] = 1 if f(i) = j, 0 otherwise (each row has exactly one 1)
coupling_construction.orbit_correlation: 1 - (steps_to_convergence / max_steps) if orbits meet; +0.2 same basin / -0.3 different basin otherwise

constants.alpha_D_description: Fundamental coupling constant (measured from Isomorphic Engine eigenspectrum)
constants.cycle_product_mod23: Both 3-cycles have product 7 mod 23: (2*3*5 = 30 = 7 mod 23) and (14*13*8 = 1456 = 7 mod 23)

verification.f6_equals_f12: For all x in Z_23, f^6(x) = f^12(x) (confirming ord(f|_E) = 6)
verification.adjacency_row_sums: Each row of A sums to exactly 1
verification.basin_coverage: All 23 elements classified into exactly one of 4 basins
